artifacts.title: README
artifacts.reason: Every generation must include a deterministic project overview and setup summary.

artifacts.title: Environment configuration
artifacts.reason: Environment scaffold is part of the canonical baseline output.

artifacts.title: Entry point
artifacts.reason: Profile native iOS / Swift requires an entry artifact wired to Sources/App/AppEntry.swift.

artifacts.title: native iOS / Swift foundation
artifacts.reason: Each platform profile contributes a deterministic foundation scaffold.

artifacts.title: module.navigation
artifacts.reason: navigation is enabled for native iOS / Swift.

artifacts.title: module.auth
artifacts.reason: auth is enabled for native iOS / Swift.

artifacts.title: module.analytics
artifacts.reason: analytics is enabled for native iOS / Swift.

artifacts.title: module.localization
artifacts.reason: localization is enabled for native iOS / Swift.

artifacts.title: module.push
artifacts.reason: push is enabled for native iOS / Swift.

artifacts.title: module.networking
artifacts.reason: networking is enabled for native iOS / Swift.

artifacts.title: module.persistence
artifacts.reason: storage is enabled for native iOS / Swift.

artifacts.title: Example home screen
artifacts.reason: Example screen is enabled to demonstrate navigation and state wiring.

artifacts.title: Manifest metadata
artifacts.reason: Every generated archive carries its own manifest for auditability.

artifacts.title: Validation report
artifacts.reason: Validation output is part of the generated package contract.

notes: iOS baseline generates services, coordinators/view-models and a native entry point scaffold.
Persistence is represented as a lightweight local storage façade in this phase.
